_comment: Browser-demo fixture for Step 9 state machine — three back-to-back audio items, each cinematic with crossfade. Tests: (1) state machine waits for unlockAudio() before emitting first item:started (Play button gates iOS audio), (2) renderer.done resolves at end-of-track and SM auto-advances via item:ended subscription, (3) skip button calls stateMachine.next() and the rapid-skip teardown timer (P1 #1) cancels any in-flight crossfade cleanly, (4) audio pipeline's analyser routes into the visualizer scene so the orb + bars react to the actual audio, (5) palette lerps to the new cover at each transition. Final item:ended fires experience:ended (chrome shows 'experience complete' state).
name: Demo — State Machine: 3-Item Sequence
description: Three audio items with crossfade — exercises Step 9 state machine + audio pipeline + cross-item palette lerp.
